Package renderer.controller

Class Renderer

java.lang.Object
renderer.controller.Renderer
public final class Renderer extends Object
The Renderer class drives the rendering pipeline: read in a scene, projects the vertices and rasterizes every faces / edges.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Renderer()
    Creates a renderer, a controller with default values.

  • Constructor Details

    • Renderer

      public Renderer() throws IOException
      Creates a renderer, a controller with default values.
      Throws:
      IOException - if files doesn't exist

  • Method Details

    • renderNormal

      public void renderNormal()
      Renders the normals of the mesh.

    • setLightingEnabled

      public void setLightingEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Enables or disables lighting.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true to enable lighting, false to disable it

    • setScene

      public void setScene(String fileName) throws IOException
      Sets the scene with the given filename.
      Parameters:
      fileName - the filename of the scene
      Throws:
      IOException - if the file doesn't exist

    • setRasterizer

      public void setRasterizer()
      Sets the rasterizer with a Rasterizer.

    • setPerspectiveCorrectRasterizer

      public void setPerspectiveCorrectRasterizer()
      Sets the rasterizer with a PerspectiveCorrectRasterizer.

    • setShader

      public void setShader(Shader shader)
      Sets the shader to the given values.
      Parameters:
      shader - the new shader.

    • render

      public ImageWrapper render() throws SizeMismatchException
      Render an image from the current parameters.
      Returns:
      the rendered image.
      Throws:
      SizeMismatchException - if the size of the fragments do not match

    • projectVertices

      public Fragment[] projectVertices()
      Projects the vertices of the mesh into the screen space.
      Returns:
      an array of fragments

    • getTransformation

      public Transformation getTransformation()
      Gets the transformation to convert the world reference to the camera reference.
      Returns:
      the transformation

    • setNormalsRendered

      public void setNormalsRendered(boolean normalsRendered)
      Sets whether the normals should be drawn.
      Parameters:
      normalsRendered - the normals should be normalsRendered

    • setWiredRendered

      public void setWiredRendered(boolean wiredRendered)
      Sets whether the wireFrameRender should be done.
      Parameters:
      wiredRendered - the new value

    • setSolidRendered

      public void setSolidRendered(boolean solidRendered)
      Sets whether the solidRender should be done.
      Parameters:
      solidRendered - the new value

    • setShader

      public boolean setShader(String shaderSelected)
      Sets the shader to a instance of the given shader value.
      Parameters:
      shaderSelected - the name of a implementation of Shader
      Returns:
      whether the operation is successful

      public void setCombineWithBaseColor(boolean selected)
      Set the parameter combine with base color of the Texture shader.
      Parameters:
      selected - the new value

    • setTexture

      public boolean setTexture(String path)
      Set the texture from the file given.
      Parameters:
      path - the path of the file
      Returns:
      whether the operation as been correctly made.

      Sets the Vertex render on te given value.

      public void setColorMap(ColorMapFactory.Maps map)
      Sets the color map for depth shader.
